StructurePhase.Reference: Pelizzone M., Braun H.F., Muller J., J. Magn. Magn. Mater., v30 p33 (1982)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NOP2. LPF Collection Code: 459173. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Y,Co,Si. Compound Preparation: arc-melted. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 1273 K for 1 w in quartz tube under argon. Article Title: MAGNETIC PROPERTIES OF RCoSi2 COMPOUNDS (R= RARE EARTH). Wyckoff Sequence: c4. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
